codeReview.summary: Test coverage for internal/server package increased from 25.4% to 52.5% by adding 1192 lines of meaningful tests. Tests cover JobStore operations (CreateJob, GetJob, ListJobs, UpdateJob, SetLectureProgress, SetOutputs, CancelJob), auth middleware edge cases (missing token, invalid format, invalid token, valid token, OPTIONS), handler validation (login, health, listJobs, getJob, deleteJob, createJob, lectures), and utility functions. All tests pass and lint passes.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The go-integration-worker skill procedure mentions starting the local API on port 8080 for manual verification. However, this was a test coverage improvement task, not a contract/API change task. The feature description explicitly says 'Improve test coverage' - no API behavior was changed. The worker correctly used unit tests with httptest instead of manual API verification. The skill procedure may need clarification for test-coverage-only tasks.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill step 5 says 'Start the local API on port 8080 for manual verification' but feature was purely test coverage. Worker used httptest instead and met all verification criteria (coverage increase from 25.4% to 52.5%, all tests pass).

summary: PASS - Coverage increased from 25.4% to 52.5%. Tests are meaningful, cover critical paths, and all verification criteria met. No blocking issues found.
